meta.title: The Air Force could get MORE combat ready F-22s!
meta.description:
The Air and Space Forces Association's Air, Space & Cyber Conference is going on this week, and as far as we can tell, Thomas Newdick at The Warzone is only journalist present to cover this story. Read his coverage here:
https://www.twz.com/air/lockheed-eyes-upgrades-for-oldest-f-22-raptors
